findings.excerpt: | Not adding `#!/bin/bash` to scripts you plan to run with `./script.sh` | Direct execution can fail because the system may not know which interpreter to use |
findings.reason: This row focuses on shell scripting and execution logic rather than the mechanics of editing files.

findings.excerpt: | Forgetting `chmod +x` before running a script | You get "Permission denied" |
findings.reason: This row discusses file system permissions and execution, which is a separate domain from editing file content.
